_doc: Victory Gas City provider hook config — Claude Code PreToolUse hooks for polecat sessions.
_usage: Merge the 'hooks' key into polecats/.claude/settings.json to activate RTK token compression for all polecat Bash commands.

PreToolUse._doc: RTK token compression — rewrites Bash commands to use rtk subcommands (git, go, npm, etc.) for LLM context savings. Requires rtk >= 0.23.0 installed globally via: cargo install rtk
